qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Arbitrary code execution via malicious pickle deserialization in SentencePiece Python wrapper
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding is about Python pickle arbitrary code execution during unpickling, not the advisory's PrefixMatcher/Darts build heap-overflow root cause.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unbounded protobuf deserialization in model loading permits memory exhaustion DoS
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding targets unbounded ModelProto protobuf parsing and repeated pieces memory exhaustion, not the advisory's PrefixMatcher/Darts build heap-overflow root cause.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Out-of-bounds memory access in SentencePiece trie traversal via unvalidated precompiled_charsmap
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Although this finding is in SentencePiece normalizer/model-file handling, it alleges corrupted precompiled_charsmap trie offsets causing out-of-bounds access in commonPrefixSearch. The advisory reference patch changes PrefixMatcher::PrefixMatcher to pass explicit lengths to Darts::DoubleArray::build, which is a different vulnerable code path and root cause.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying final finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code/root cause. The advisory is for SentencePiece heap overflow fixed by google/sentencepiece commit d856b67fdb3492e035489abf9b3aaf486144b2c0, whose diff changes PrefixMatcher::PrefixMatcher to pass string lengths to Darts::DoubleArray::build. The qualifying final findings cover pickle RCE, generic protobuf memory exhaustion, and a different precompiled_charsmap trie traversal claim.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-38vq-g6vr-w8wf describes invalid memory access in SentencePiece versions before 0.2.1 when using a crafted model file.
The advisory reference commit d856b67fdb3492e035489abf9b3aaf486144b2c0 changes PrefixMatcher::PrefixMatcher in src/normalizer.cc to build the Darts trie with explicit key lengths.
No qualifying final vulnerability report identifies PrefixMatcher::PrefixMatcher, the Darts::DoubleArray::build call with missing lengths, or an equivalent source-to-sink/control-flow condition.
